pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.5.0 to align with the Java 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE namespaces; the old 2.1.8 version is incompatible with Java 21 features and modern dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 21; keeping 1.8 would result in compilation errors or missing language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the legacy MySQL connector artifact with the new group ID and artifact ID required by Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact 'mysql-connector-java' is deprecated/removed in newer ecosystems; 'mysql-connector-j' is the required replacement for compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JJWT dependencies to version 0.12.3 to support Java 21 and modern security standards.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JJWT versions may have compatibility issues with Java 21 or lack support for newer algorithms/security fixes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Validation starter to replace the removed javax.validation dependency in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 uses Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces; javax.validation is no longer available, causing compile errors if validation is used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use Java 21 source and target levels.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit configuration, the compiler might default to an older Java version, causing compilation failures for Java 21 features.

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Change user ID field type from Integer to Long to match the underlying User entity schema.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: Type mismatch compile error or runtime ClassCastException when assigning user.getId() if the User entity uses Long.

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Update username getter call to match the renamed method in the User entity.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: Compile error: method getUsername() not found in User class after rename to getUserName().

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist'.

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest with jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3.x).

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Change the exception superclass from RuntimeException to a custom BaseException to standardize error handling.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: The class no longer extends RuntimeException, so it must extend the new BaseException to compile and function as an exception.

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Update constructor to accept a Map and delegate to BaseException with a specific ErrorCode.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: The old constructor signature and super() call are incompatible with the new BaseException requirements.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.after:
public UserNameAlreadyExistException(Map<String, Object> data) {
        super(ErrorCode.USER_NAME_ALREADY_EXIST, data);

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Add import for java.util.Map required by the new constructor parameter.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol class Map.

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Rename method to match the actual field name in the User entity to prevent runtime query failures.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: Spring Data JPA derives queries from method names; if the entity field is 'userName' (camelCase) but the method is 'findByUsername', the query will fail at runtime with a PropertyReferenceException or similar error because 'username' is not a valid property path.

src/test/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Migrate test annotations from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/test/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses JUnit 5 by default; JUnit 4 annotations like @RunWith and org.junit.Test are either removed or cause compilation errors due to missing dependencies or API incompatibility.

src/test/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Update imports to use JUnit 5 and Spring Test JUnit 5 extensions instead of JUnit 4 equivalents.
src/test/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: The old imports (org.junit.Test, org.junit.runner.RunWith, org.springframework.test.context.junit4.SpringRunner) do not exist or are incompatible in the JUnit 5/Spring Boot 3 environment, leading to compilation errors.
